- Interrupt the cast with Velvet's Consuming Claw (Break Soul) targeting Innominat directly — this is uniquely effective against Empyrean-type enemies
- After the interrupt, Laphicet will initiate a special story-driven attack — watch the cutscene that inserts here, then immediately use Velvet's Mystic Arte

**Strategy:**
- **Recommended Party:** Velvet (control), Laphicet (for his Phase 3 mechanic), Eleanor (healer)
- Sub: Rokurou, Eizen, Magilou
- Save Velvet's Break Soul specifically for Phase 3's interrupt — don't waste it on Phase 1-2 unless HP is critical
- Eleanor must stay active for her healing aura — Innominat deals sustained high damage
- Stock all 5 Elixirs for this fight; use them freely

**Reward:** Major story cutscene, story progression, unique "Empyrean Fragment" item

> 🏆 **Achievement: The Empyrean's Will** — Unlocked after defeating Innominat and watching the revelation cutscene.

<!-- checkpoint: innominat-defeated | Innominat Defeated -->

## The Truth of Velvet's Desire

After Innominat's defeat, the story's most emotionally devastating revelations play out:

- Innominat's suppression of Velvet's malevolence (hatred, desire for revenge) partially lifts — and Velvet realizes that underneath her rage, her true desire was never to kill Artorius. It was to **protect Laphicet** — the same desire she had three years ago when she failed to save her brother.
- Laphicet (Phi) reveals he knows what Velvet truly feels — and he has grown beyond being just a vessel or a tool. He is his own person, who chose this family.
- Artorius is waiting in the throne room, fully aware of what is about to happen.

> Watch every cutscene here without skipping. The game's emotional payoff is entirely in these scenes.

## Final Boss: Artorius Collbrande

<!-- checkpoint: artorius-final-boss | Final Battle — Artorius Collbrande -->

The final boss. Artorius does not hold back.

- **HP:** ~150,000 (Normal)
- This is a **three-phase fight** with a cutscene break between Phase 2 and 3.

**Phase 1 (100%-60% HP) — The Shepherd:**
- **Shepherd's Blade:** Fast, tracking sword strike — sidestep at the moment of contact
- **Holy Arcs:** Multiple arcing projectiles in a wide fan — dash through the center gap or jump above the lowest arc
- **Exorcism Convergence:** Artorius marks all 3 active party members with targeting circles — explosive detonation after 2 seconds; dash away from your target marker
- **Strategy:** Standard sustained damage. All party members can deal effective damage here. Use Eleanor's healing aura, break Soul on cooldown.

**Phase 2 (60%-30% HP) — The Empyrean Shepherd:**
- Artorius absorbs Innominat's power and enters a second form
- **Divine Suppression:** Artorius fires a concentrated suppression beam; dodge perpendicular to its direction, never directly away
- **Malevolence Burst:** AoE explosion; the center is safe — rush TOWARD Artorius when you see this animation
- **Reaver's Judgement:** His most powerful attack — a 5-hit combo dealing enormous damage to one character. Guard the first 4 hits and sidestep the 5th (it has a deceptive delay).
- **Strategy:** Focus damage on Velvet (Break Soul active constantly). Eleanor must maintain healer mode at all times. Laphicet switches to offense mode here — his arte set is strong against Artorius's new form. Use Mystic Arte (all characters available) during this phase.

**Phase 3 (below 30% HP) — Cutscene, then: The Final Form:**
- A pivotal story cutscene plays — watch it fully; it recontextualizes Artorius's motivation completely
- When control returns, Artorius has one final form with roughly 30,000 HP remaining
- **Final Strategy:** Use everything. All remaining Mystic Artes. All remaining Elixirs. Activate every Break Soul the moment the gauge fills. The fight has been designed for you to win here if you've been managing resources properly.
- **Reaver Omega:** His final arte — a single massive strike dealing your maximum HP in damage to all characters. If you are below max HP when this lands, it is instant KO. Keep party HP at maximum during the final phase.

**Reward:** Ending cutscene sequence, credits.

> 🏆 **Achievement: The End of Desire** — Unlocked when Artorius is defeated.

<!-- checkpoint: artorius-defeated | Artorius Collbrande Defeated -->

## The Ending

Without spoiling the specifics, the ending of Tales of Berseria is:
- **Bittersweet but earned.** Velvet's desire is fulfilled, but the cost is real.
- **Connected to Tales of Zestiria.** If you've played Zestiria, the ending reveals the connections between the two games. If you haven't, there are elements that will become clearer if you play Zestiria later — Tales of Berseria is a prequel.
- Laphicet's fate is the emotional center of the conclusion. His growth from a nameless numbered malak to the person he becomes is the true heart of the story.

Watch the full credits. There is a **post-credits scene** that is significant to Berseria/Zestiria fans.

<!-- checkpoint: game-complete | Tales of Berseria Complete -->

> 🏆 **Achievement: A New Journey** — Unlocked after the credits and post-credits scene conclude.

## New Game Plus (NG+)

After completing the game, **New Game+** unlocks. Use your accumulated **Grade** to purchase NG+ bonuses at the Grade Shop:

**Recommended Grade Shop Purchases:**
| Bonus | Grade Cost | Recommendation |
|-------|-----------|----------------|
| Keep EXP | 1,000 | Essential if going for achievements |
| Keep all Artes | 1,500 | Strongly recommended |
| Keep Gald | 500 | Useful |
| Keep Items | 800 | Useful |
| 10x EXP multiplier | 3,000 | Essential for achievement farming |
| Enemy Level +5 | 1,000 | For a more challenging NG+ |

**Achievement Cleanup in NG+:**
- Any skits you missed in the first playthrough appear in their original locations on NG+
- Sub-events reset and can be completed again
- The "Avid Reader" achievement can be completed in NG+ if you missed any skits
- Cooking achievements, arte achievements, and kill-count achievements all carry over from NG

steps.text: 🛑 **ABSOLUTE POINT OF NO RETURN:** Entering the final dungeon ends free exploration permanently. The game proceeds to credits without any open-world access. Complete EVERY sub-event, trophy-related task, cooking, and shopping before entering.
Open pause → Sub-Events and confirm all major chains are complete: Eizen's chain (5 entries), Eleanor's chain, Laphicet's chain, Magilou's chain. Return to Yseult/Meirchio if any entries remain.
Equip all 6 characters with their best weapons from Meirchio and Dragon Scale Vest armor. Equip all accessories. No character should have empty equipment slots.
Stock supplies at the Van Eltia shop: **Orange Gel ×30**, **High Orange Gel ×15**, **Life Bottle ×8**, **Elixir ×5**, **Panacea Bottle ×15**.
Cook **Dragon Cuisine** (ATK +15% party), **Noble's Feast** (ATK/DEF buffs), and **Sailor's Stew** (status resist) at the Van Eltia galley before entering the final dungeon.
**Recommended Level:** 50-55 for Normal difficulty. If below 45, grind with Starlight Stew (EXP multiplier recipe) in any outdoor area before proceeding.
In **The Outer Hall** (Section 1), fight through the enemy gauntlet conserving recovery items. Use Magilou's Gravity Well to group enemies for AoE damage.
In **The Inner Sanctum** (Section 2), complete all 3 seals: defeat the daemon guardian, solve the light-mirror puzzle, and kill all 12 small daemons within 90 seconds.
After Seal 2's light-mirror puzzle, check the **hidden alcove** to the right for **High Elixir ×2** and the **Artorius's Design** lore document.

**BOSS: Oscar & Teresa (Final)** — Simultaneous fight. Keep both under 20% HP simultaneously before bursting either down. Oscar weak to wind, Teresa to dark. Eleanor must stay active as healer. HP: Oscar ~65,000 / Teresa ~70,000.
steps.note: Strategy: Balanced DPS both bosses → burst Oscar with Velvet Break Soul + Rokurou → immediately pivot to Teresa with Magilou.

steps.text: After Oscar/Teresa, find the **warp point** in the Inner Sanctum to return to the Van Eltia for final restocking. Cook Dragon Cuisine again and replenish all used items.

**BOSS: Innominat (Empyrean)** — Three phases. Save Velvet's Break Soul for the Phase 3 interrupt of Final Suppression. Active party: Velvet, Laphicet, Eleanor. Use Elixirs freely — this is the hardest fight before Artorius. HP: ~120,000.
steps.note: Phase 3 trigger: Innominat channels Final Suppression (15-sec cast). Interrupt with Velvet's Consuming Claw. Then watch story cutscene, then Velvet Mystic Arte.

steps.text: Watch every cutscene after Innominat without skipping. The revelation about Velvet's true desire and Laphicet's identity are the emotional core of the entire game.

**FINAL BOSS: Artorius Collbrande** — Three phases. Phase 1: sustained damage. Phase 2: Laphicet + Eleanor + Velvet, all Mystic Artes. Phase 3: use EVERYTHING. Avoid Reaver Omega (keep all HP near maximum). HP: ~150,000 total across all phases.
steps.note: Between Phase 2 and 3, a critical story cutscene plays. Watch it in full — then unleash all remaining Mystic Artes and Break Souls in Phase 3.

steps.text: Watch the full ending cutscenes and **stay through the credits** for the post-credits scene. This scene is significant for the Berseria/Zestiria connection.
**New Game+:** At the Grade Shop, prioritize: Keep Artes (1,500G), 10x EXP multiplier (3,000G), Keep EXP (1,000G). NG+ resets sub-events and skit locations — ideal for achievement cleanup.
